title: [FIRRTL] Crash with an immediate combinational loop on an output
body:
The following circuit leads to a `firtool` crash:
```
circuit c:
  module c:
    output out: UInt<1>
    out <= out
```

The backtrace is the following:
```
firtool: circt/llvm/mlir/lib/IR/PatternMatch.cpp:307: virtual void mlir::RewriterBase::eraseOp(mlir::Operation*): Assertion `op->use_empty() && "expected 'op' to have no uses"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: firtool out_loop.fir
```
